calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-06-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Allison Austin, Esq. for Petitioner Nicholas Leahy, also present, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Nicole Patricia Leahy.
The Court further orders the GENDER of Nicole Patricia Leahy is changed from MALE to FEMALE.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-09-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.
There being no appearances, this matter is ordered off calendar.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-12-2003 Reset To Sep-09-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Allison Austin, Esq., for Petitioner present and requests continuance for Petitioner.
This matter is continued to SEP-09-2003 at 9:00 am in Dept. 218.
